ocr.text: In the Private Equity Performance table, the vintage year performance is detailed with the following metrics: for the year 2021,
the Vintage Year Returns is 15%, Investment Amount is $120M, Fund Count is 5, Average Return is 18%, Total Capital is

and 5; for 2019, the values are 10%, $150M, 4, 12%, $220M, 17%, and 6; for 2018, the results are 8%, $80M, 9, 12%, $220M,
4, and 3; for 2017, the statistics are 20%, $130M, 6, 17%, $280M, 8, and 5; and for 2022, the data show 14%, $110M, 5, 15%,
